title: Stop using docker.Image

comments.body:
> @runcom PTAL (non-urgent), primarly WDYT about eventually dropping the NewImage interface and forcing callers to deal with ImageSource and image.FromSource / FromUnparsedImage themselves? Or maybe wrap that in something like c/image/image.FromReference(types.ImageReference) so that callers continue to need only one call instead of two?

I'm all for removing `NewImage` and have people use the low-level apis (as that's really what I wanted at the beginning of c/image)
Thanks; merging this at least, we can then drop `docker.Image` and consider the fate of `NewImage` in c/image PRs.
